label: 端口路由
description: 按「规则 + 参数」从多个动态输入端口中选择一个，原样透传到输出。规则为字符串 [{A:2},{C:3}]（键→动态端口下标），参数为字符串如 (A,C)（生效的键集合）。按规则书写顺序取第一个命中参数集合的键，将其对应下标的动态端口 port_<n> 原样输出。无命中或该端口未连接时不输出。
description-en: Route one of several dynamic input ports to the output based on rules + params. Rules is a string like [{A:2},{C:3}] (key -> dynamic port index); params is a string like (A,C) (the set of active keys). The first rule (in written order) whose key is in params selects its dynamic port port_<n>, forwarded unchanged. No output when nothing matches or that port is unconnected.
icon: 三条线汇入一个开关/分流器，其中一条被高亮选中并通向右侧输出，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: rules
inputs.label: 规则
inputs.description: 路由规则字符串，形如 [{A:2},{C:3}]：键映射到动态端口下标。按书写顺序匹配，先命中者优先。
inputs.description-en: Routing rules string like [{A:2},{C:3}]: maps a key to a dynamic port index. Matched in written order; first hit wins.

inputs.name: params
inputs.label: 参数
inputs.description: 生效的键集合字符串，形如 (A,C)。其中出现的键用于在规则中匹配，决定选用哪个端口。
inputs.description-en: Active key set string like (A,C). Keys present here are matched against the rules to pick a port.

outputs.name: value
outputs.label: 输出
outputs.description: 被选中动态端口的输入，原样透传。
outputs.description-en: The selected dynamic port's input, forwarded unchanged.
